company_name: Holly Days Nursery, Garden Center, & Landscaping
tagline: The One Stop Shop for All Your Gardening and Landscaping Needs

hero.headline:
Your Dream Landscape Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: For over 30 years, Holly Days Nursery has been Southeastern Pennsylvania's trusted partner for award-winning landscape design, premium plants, and stunning hardscapes. From our seven-acre garden center to your backyard, we bring your vision to life.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Everything for Your Outdoor<br class="hidden md:block"> Living Space
services.subtitle: From a single shrub to a complete landscape transformation, Holly Days is your one-stop shop for plants, design, hardscaping, and aquatics across Southeastern Pennsylvania.

cards.title: Nursery & Garden Center
cards.description: Seven acres of annuals, perennials, trees, shrubs, garden decor, and more. One of the largest retail and wholesale garden centers in the Philadelphia region.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Award-winning designers create custom layouts for front walkways, patios, retaining walls, outdoor living spaces, and complete property transformations.

cards.title: Hardscape Construction
cards.description: Expert installation of paver patios, walkways, retaining walls, and steps. We handle removal, grading, and seamless blending of new and existing construction.

cards.title: Pond & Water Features
cards.description: The largest aquatics department in the area. Custom koi ponds, waterfalls, fountains, and water features — including excavation, plumbing, and hardscaping.

cards.title: Pond Maintenance
cards.description: Professional pond care to keep your water features clean, healthy, and beautiful year-round. Regular maintenance plans and seasonal services available.

cards.title: Bulk Materials & Delivery
cards.description: Mulch, soil, stone, sand, and more in bulk quantities. Convenient delivery across Southeastern Pennsylvania for DIY and professional projects.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Outdoor Space

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your property and what you're dreaming of. Our award-winning designers will provide a free consultation and honest, no-pressure estimate within days.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: Our experienced team handles every detail — from plant selection at our seven-acre nursery to expert installation. We bring 30+ years of craftsmanship to your project.

steps.title: Love Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Enjoy a stunning landscape, beautiful hardscape, or tranquil water feature built to last. We stand behind every project with our commitment to quality and your satisfaction.

about.label: Why Homeowners Trust Holly Days
about.headline: Not Just a Nursery — Your Complete Outdoor Partner
about.description: Family-owned and operated since 1994, Holly Days Nursery has been Southeastern Pennsylvania's go-to for everything outdoors. Voted one of the Top 5 Landscapers in Philadelphia by CBS Philly, our team of the finest designers in the region brings creative, customized solutions to every property. From our seven-acre garden center to award-winning landscape and hardscape construction, we treat every project like it's our own home.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Team
features.description: Our designers are recognized among the finest in the Philadelphia region, delivering creative and ergonomic layouts customized to your property.

features.title: Seven-Acre Garden Center
features.description: Browse one of the largest nurseries in the area with a huge selection of trees, shrubs, perennials, annuals, and garden decor — all in one place.

features.title: A+ BBB Rating & 30+ Years
features.description: Three decades of proven quality backed by a Better Business Bureau A+ rating. We earn your trust on every single project.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Honest Estimates.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. Get a free consultation and detailed estimate tailored to your property — no hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any project or purchase, let us know. We'll come back and make it right — that's the Holly Days promise. With 30+ years of reputation on the line, we don't cut corners. Every plant, every stone, every design detail is handled with care until it meets your expectations.

faqs.question: How soon can you start my landscaping project?
faqs.answer: Most projects are scheduled within 1-2 weeks depending on scope and season. For urgent needs, we do our best to accommodate. Call us and we'll walk through your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you offer free design consultations?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer complimentary consultations where our award-winning designers visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide a detailed estimate. No pressure, no obligation.

faqs.question: Can I visit your nursery and pick out my own plants?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our seven-acre garden center in Ambler is open to the public. Browse our huge selection of trees, shrubs, perennials, annuals, and garden decor. Our knowledgeable staff is always on hand to help.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial projects?
faqs.answer: Yes. We serve homeowners, property managers, HOAs, and commercial clients across Southeastern Pennsylvania. From small garden plantings to large-scale landscape and hardscape installations, we do it all.

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery for bulk materials?
faqs.answer: We do. We carry mulch, soil, stone, sand, and more in bulk quantities with convenient delivery throughout the region. Just let us know what you need and where it's going.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: Truly one of the best customer service I've ever experienced in any industry. I decided to use them for all my future projects.

testimonials.name: Long-time Client
testimonials.text: We have used their pond services for over a decade and have always been impressed and pleased with the level of professionalism, knowledge, and service.

testimonials.name: Garden Center Shopper
testimonials.text: Largest selection in this region for perennials and trees. I was beyond impressed.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure consultation and estimate. Our award-winning team will help you plan the landscape, hardscape, or water feature you've always wanted.
benefits: Free on-site consultation with every estimate

footer.description: Family-owned nursery, garden center, and landscaping company. Proudly serving Southeastern PA since 1994.
